ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst, Contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual's work class */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight computed for the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual's education level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to marital status */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship status */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual's race */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual's sex */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains reported by the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses reported by the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of origin */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual record being tracked */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., Private, Self-emp-inc) */,
  "workclass_description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., HS-grad, Doctorate) */,
  "education_description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Married-civ-spouse, Never-married) */,
  "marital_status_description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Exec-managerial, Adm-clerical) */,
  "occupation_description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status (e.g., Husband, Wife) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "race_description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "sex_description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., United-States, France) */,
  "country_description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "contributor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual record contributed */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES data_contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_contributions_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)
